title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: CS50 examines why AI still lags behind humans in reliably editing Word documents at scale. The challenge stems from treating documents as structured software with internal logic rather than simple text files, requiring trustworthy automated changes across thousands of documents simultaneously.
